rationale: Xi's confirmed visit to Pyongyang materialises the deepening authoritarian axis supporting Russia, directly relevant to Ukraine's war effort and long-term security; the war itself continues without new qualitative escalation reported.

top_events.title: Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang to revitalise China-North Korea ties
top_events.summary: Xi's physical presence in Pyongyang confirms deepening China-North Korea-Russia axis; strengthens the bloc backing Russia in the war against Ukraine, a direct strategic threat.

top_events.title: US-Iran war to pull global economy to post-COVID low: World Bank
top_events.summary: Continued Western bandwidth consumed by Middle East tensions risks diverting attention and resources from Ukrainian aid.

top_events.title: Vance says Israeli PM Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US political focus on Middle East diplomacy continues to compete with Ukraine for Washington's attention; no direct change in aid levels.
